deploy.startCommand:
sh -c 'pip install --no-cache-dir cryptography && PYTHONPATH=/app alembic upgrade head && if [ -f /app/archive/drawer/tooling-assets/apigetxlsx/aitool/manifests/db_import_payload.json ]; then PYTHONPATH=/app python app/scripts/import_aitool_preview.py --limit 0 --status-mode published --featured-mode payload; else echo "Skipping preview payload import: archive payload not present"; fi && PYTHONPATH=/app python app/scripts/cleanup_production_catalog.py && PYTHONPATH=/app python - <<'"'"'PY'"'"'
from app.db.session import SessionLocal
from app.services.catalog_views_seed import seed_catalog_views
session = SessionLocal()
try:
    ranking_count, scenario_count = seed_catalog_views(session)
    session.commit()
    print(f"Catalog views refreshed: {ranking_count} rankings, {scenario_count} scenarios.")
finally:
    session.close()
PY
PYTHONPATH=/app python - <<'"'"'PY'"'"'
from redis import Redis
from app.core.config import settings
client = Redis.from_url(settings.redis_url, decode_responses=True)
keys = list(client.scan_iter(match="catalog:*")) + list(client.scan_iter(match="ai-search:*"))
if keys:
    client.delete(*keys)
print(f"Deleted {len(keys)} cache keys")
PY
PYTHONPATH=/app uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}'
